prompt: Manufacturing work orders expand nested assemblies into required material quantities. One-level kits are correct, but nested quantities are not multiplied through each assembly and the same leaf reached through two branches is not combined. Legacy data may contain a cycle and must remain bounded. Preserve query parameters, result columns, direct component listing, and SQLite compatibility.

repo_files.sql/explode_work_order.sql:
SELECT child_sku, quantity AS required_quantity, 1 AS depth
FROM component
WHERE assembly_sku = :root_sku
ORDER BY depth, child_sku;
repo_files.sql/list_components.sql:
SELECT child_sku, quantity
FROM component
WHERE assembly_sku = :assembly_sku
ORDER BY child_sku;
repo_files.sql/required_materials.sql:
SELECT child_sku, SUM(quantity * :build_count) AS required_quantity
FROM component
WHERE assembly_sku = :root_sku
GROUP BY child_sku
ORDER BY child_sku;
